narrative:
Fairfield Township has 2,241 registered voters, with 55.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 35.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 8.5%, a pronounced Republican lean of 27.3 percentage points.
